skill.name: frontend-design
skill.description: Guides Codex, Claude, and Claude Code to create distinctive frontend interfaces with strong visual direction, polished interactions, and production-ready implementation details.
skill.summary: Create polished frontend interfaces with a clear aesthetic direction.
skill.author: am-will

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported weak cryptographic algorithm and system reconnaissance patterns in SKILL.md. Manual review found only frontend design prose and no executable code, cryptographic APIs, host inspection, network access, filesystem access, or prompt injection attempt.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Static Finding: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: False positive. The flagged lines are metadata or frontend design guidance, not cryptographic code. No evidence found of MD5, SHA-1, DES, RC4, or any cryptographic operation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The file contains natural language design instructions only. The flagged lines do not contain cryptographic functions, imports, algorithms, or encoded data.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Static Finding: System Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: False positive. The flagged lines discuss design quality, typography, and visual details. No evidence found of commands or instructions to collect host, user, process, network, or environment information.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced text is frontend design prose and contains no system commands or reconnaissance intent. There is no executable script or tool invocation in the skill.

content.value_statement: Many AI-built interfaces look generic and lack product context. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code toward polished, purposeful frontend work.
actual_capabilities: Frames a clear aesthetic direction before implementation starts.
Guides production-ready HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, or Vue interface work.
Encourages distinctive typography, color, motion, spacing, and visual detail choices.
Adapts design complexity to the requested product, audience, and technical constraints.
Pushes generated interfaces away from common generic AI visual patterns.
limitations: It provides design guidance, not a complete component library.
It does not include executable scripts, templates, or image assets.
Accessibility and performance still require project-specific validation.
Final quality depends on the user prompt and available application context.

use_cases.title: Prototype a Product Screen
use_cases.description: Create a polished dashboard, settings page, onboarding flow, or landing screen with a clear visual direction.

use_cases.title: Improve an Existing Interface
use_cases.description: Refine layout, typography, color, motion, and spacing while preserving the current frontend stack.

use_cases.title: Explore Brand Directions
use_cases.description: Generate visually distinct interface options for a product, campaign, or internal tool.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Simple Page
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a single frontend surface.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a responsive pricing page for a small SaaS product. Use a distinctive visual direction and include polished hover states.

prompt_templates.title: Redesign a Component
prompt_templates.scenario: Focused improvement of one interface element.
prompt_templates.prompt: Redesign this empty state for a project management app. Make it useful, memorable, and consistent with a calm professional product.

prompt_templates.title: Create an App View
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request for a functional product interface.
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a React analytics dashboard for a content team. Include filters, key metrics, trend cards, and a strong editorial design direction.

prompt_templates.title: Define a Full Visual System
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request for a broader frontend direction.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a complete frontend direction for an AI research workspace. Include layout strategy, typography, color, motion, core screens, and implementation details.

output_examples.input: Create a landing page for a boutique architecture studio.
output_examples.output: A refined landing page concept with strong typography, disciplined spacing, project imagery, subtle motion, and a focused contact path.

output_examples.input: Improve the dashboard for a logistics operations team.
output: A denser operations layout with clear status hierarchy.
Sharper table scanning, practical filters, and restrained color signals.
Interaction notes for hover states, alerts, and responsive behavior.

output_examples.input: Design a playful onboarding flow for a consumer finance app.
output_examples.output: A multi-step onboarding direction with approachable visuals, crisp microcopy, careful form states, and trust-building interface details.

best_practices: Provide the product purpose, audience, brand tone, and frontend stack before asking for implementation.
Ask for responsive states, interaction states, and accessibility considerations in the same request.
Review generated visual choices against real product constraints before shipping.
anti_patterns: Do not ask only for a generic modern page without product context.
Do not accept decorative effects that reduce readability or task completion.
Do not skip validation for accessibility, performance, and responsive layout.

faq.question: Does this skill write frontend code?
faq.answer: Yes. It guides the assistant to produce working frontend code when the user asks for implementation.

faq.question: Which tools does it support?
faq.answer: It is marked for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Does it include a design system?
faq.answer: No. It guides design decisions, but it does not ship reusable design system files.

faq.question: Can it work with React or Vue?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill references React, Vue, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as possible implementation targets.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. Manual review found only design instructions and no confirmed security issue.

faq.question: What context improves results?
faq.answer: Share the product goal, audience, brand tone, required screens, framework, and constraints.
